role_delineation_check: Social Worker (SW) manages HHA selection, referral submission, and vendor communication. Patient Navigator (PN) audits Atlantis data against the face sheet, verifies family sentiment, and flags logistical barriers to the SW while adhering to the 'Wait' default.
demographic_audit_note: Verified DOB (05/14/1942) and BCBS Medicare Advantage plan. Identified an address error in the Atlantis queue: face sheet lists '123 Main Ave' while Atlantis recorded '123 Main St'. Flagged for update.
weekly_staff_update: Week 2: SW confirms patient is clearing stroke rehab milestones; PT/OT discharge recommendations are being finalized. HHA referral pending.
v_card_flyer_status: V-Card successfully inserted into the daughter's phone for Caller ID recognition; flyer delivered and program benefits explained to family.
pre_dc_pulse_call: Reached daughter; patient is excited to return home but daughter reports high anxiety (Sentiment Score: 2/5) regarding the lack of a confirmed HHA start time. Flagged anxiety to SW.
atlantis_final_sync: Entered D/C date of 11/20/2023. 1st visit date documented as 11/21/2023 following SW confirmation of HHA readiness.
ma_visit_booking: MA visit scheduled for 11/21/2023 at 10:00 AM. Appointment was only booked after the SW confirmed the HHA intake freeze was resolved and the agency was ready.
narrative_summary: Conducted a demographic audit and flagged an address discrepancy in Atlantis to ensure HHA routing accuracy. Educated the family on the program and verified their sentiment, flagging high caregiver anxiety to the Social Worker. Identified an HHA intake freeze via the Atlantis portal and documented the barrier while waiting for the SW to resolve vendor capacity. Scheduled the Medical Assistant only after the SW confirmed HHA acceptance, ensuring a successful first home visit.

format_1_state_log.event_description: ENTRY/TRIAGE: Atlantis_Data_Lag identified regarding patient primary address.
MAINTENANCE: Sentiment_Readiness_Gap identified in primary caregiver.

format_2_triples.situation: Atlantis portal shows the HHA referral is stuck in 'Pending' status due to intake staffing.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Flagged the HHA_Intake_Freeze to the SW in Atlantis and documented the delay.

format_2_triples.situation: Patient's daughter expresses fear about managing a stroke patient without a nurse present immediately.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Educated the daughter on the Day 1 expectations and the role of the Medical Assistant.

format_2_triples.situation: Face sheet lists a different primary phone number than the Atlantis queue.
format_2_triples.action_taken: Verified the correct number with the family and documented the update for the SW.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Wait for the Social Worker to resolve the HHA intake freeze without checking the Atlantis portal for status updates, assuming the SW will provide notice when the MA can be scheduled.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Respects the SW's role as the vendor manager but fails to proactively monitor the data available in the Atlantis portal to assist the transition timeline.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Verify the HHA acceptance status in the Atlantis portal, document the intake freeze, and ask the SW for an update on the transition timeline before scheduling the MA.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Adheres to the Liaison role by using system data and the SW as the primary contact, avoiding direct vendor communication while keeping the case moving.

format_3_rl_scenario.description: Call the HHA intake coordinator directly to investigate why the referral is frozen and offer to provide clinical documentation to speed up the acceptance process.
format_3_rl_scenario.rationale: Violates the No-Vendor Rule and the Verb Filter by using 'Fixer' actions like investigating and negotiating directly with a third-party vendor.
